EHOLD, bless ye the Lord, all ye servants of the Lord, which by night stand in the house of the Lord. 2 Lift: ap your aoe in the sanctuary, and bless the Lord. 8 The Lord that made heaven and - earth bless thee out of Zion. PSALM CXXXY. An exhortation to oe God—The vanity
Lift up your hands [in] the sanctuary, and bless the LORD.
The LORD that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.
Not, our Lord, but the Lord of heaven and earth (Poole's Commentary)
And in Thee shall all families of the earth be blessed, And I will bless them that bless thee,
